title: ClassicCraft
description: An old beta aesthetic resource pack, but this one is fully complete!
body:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/syOK99o2/images/19d6f2bd41a5bdb7f48dc5325f72f68474096544.webp)

ClassicCraft is a resource pack that stylizes everything in game to fit more in line with Minecraft's beta versions. Beyond just retexturing blocks and items, ClassicCraft:

- Changes all of Lena Raine and Aaron Cherof's music to unused tracks from Volume Alpha & Beta.
- Remodels mobs and blocks to have a simpler shape in some instances.
- Redesigns some blocks that don't fit beta design principles.
- Changes most items to be two dimensional when dropped.
- Adds some Vanilla Tweak shaders to fix some visual gaffes.
- Changes recipe book icon for Nostalgia Tweaks

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
VanillaTweaks TOS: https://vanillatweaks.net/terms/
C418 styled Otherside by Jachael123 & AuroraBlis.
"C418 - Mice" by Siivagunner.
